Iron Condor day? - Intraday post (01/Dec)

Weekly post:

Pivotal weeks ahead - Weekly post (1-5/Dec)

Free technical review of SPX, Gold, BTC:

[free] SPX, Gold, BTC - A quick overview of the recent momentum and sentiment

I also want you to remember that I dropped an educational post about the intraday posts:

A Guide to Reading My Daily Posts

And I opened a “Guestbook” thread, where you can share your experiences, advices, testimonials regarding my substack with others…

Ok, now lets jump into the daily positioning breakdown…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Downside RV is very much sold, speed profile is very convex to the downside, towards 6719.95Upside vol is also sold, but not that heavily, so the net speed profile is negative. The path of the least resistance is to the upside, while market is confident with downside liquidity.

The centroid is in the 6742.52 - 6769.30 area.

Downside pivot is at 6723.84with target of 6719.95;

Upside pivot is at 6842.12with target of 6854.98

Now, the positioning is complicated further by an IC of 6805/10 - 6875/80,and the bet is very high. In the center, there is an MM short straddle at the upside target. This means, that within the IC range, the spot is either above or below this line, and will be pinned to the nearest wing.This is a local effect.

However, the market is currently trading at 6798 during asia session.And I mark the 6790/95 zone that should be held if the spot wants to climb back into the IC range. Otherwise it will grind down towards the centroid, and stay there. All in all, left-tail is sold.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
